original_query: select s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey, p_mfgr, s_address, s_phone, s_comment from part, supplier, partsupp, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and p_size = 46 and p_type like '%NICKEL' and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'ASIA' and ps_supplycost = ( select min(ps_supplycost) from partsupp, supplier, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'ASIA' ) order by s_acctbal desc, n_name, s_name, p_partkey limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_parts AS (
  SELECT p_partkey, p_mfgr
  FROM part
  WHERE p_size = 46 AND p_type LIKE '%NICKEL'
),
min_supply_costs AS (
  SELECT 
    ps_partkey, 
    min(ps_supplycost) AS min_ps_supplycost
  FROM 
    partsupp
    JOIN supplier ON ps_suppkey = s_suppkey
    JOIN nation ON s_nationkey = n_nationkey
    JOIN region ON n_regionkey = r_regionkey
    JOIN filtered_parts ON ps_partkey = p_partkey
  WHERE 
    r_name = 'ASIA'
  GROUP BY 
    ps_partkey
)
SELECT 
  s_acctbal, 
  s_name, 
  n_name, 
  p.p_partkey, 
  p_mfgr, 
  s_address, 
  s_phone, 
  s_comment
FROM 
  filtered_parts p
  JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
  JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
  JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
  JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
  JOIN min_supply_costs msc ON 
      p.p_partkey = msc.ps_partkey 
      AND ps.ps_supplycost = msc.min_ps_supplycost
WHERE 
  r.r_name = 'ASIA'
ORDER BY 
  s_acctbal DESC, 
  n_name, 
  s_name, 
  p.p_partkey
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replaced correlated subquery with a CTE that precomputes minimum supply costs for each part in the ASIA region
Converted implicit joins to explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and performance
Eliminated repeated execution of the subquery by computing minimum costs once in the CTE
